title: Luffy Returns to the Final Fight
description: The crew prepares to leave Skypiea with new memories, treasure, and the fulfilled promise of the golden bell.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Luffy, Aisa, Enel, Nami, Wyper. The crew prepares to leave Skypiea with new memories, treasure, and the fulfilled promise of the golden bell.

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Who'd care about somethin' like that!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Ah! Even his bones are a mess!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, isn't that one of the guerillas?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're not obligated to treat him.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huh? What's that supposed to be?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: And don't worry! I can save him!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I think it fell into the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Guess we'll continue to being broke-ass pirates.

summary: The crew prepares to leave Skypiea with new memories, treasure, and the fulfilled promise of the golden bell.
